prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_3: large cyan metal cube
  - obj_4: large gray metal sphere
  - obj_5: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_7: large red rubber cube
  - obj_8: small green rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0181] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0182] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0185] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0186] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0187] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0188] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0189] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0190] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0191] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0192] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0193] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0194] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0195] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0196] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0197] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0198] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0199] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0200] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
